title: viola × montivaga
intro: Viola × montivaga, also known as the viola hybrid or montivaga violet, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola sororia var. montivaga, two species of violets. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Viola × montivaga include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. Viola × montivaga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to offer its medicinal properties when consumed.
